466.title: Small Dog Meetup - General Ticket | Coby's Cafe
466.description: Join us at Coby's Café on Friday, April 24 from 5-6:30pm for a Small Dog Meetup. Tickets required for non-Members, Members reserve a free spot.Tickets are for dogs not humans! Due to limited capacity, each dog can bring up to 2 humans.

467.title: Members Free RSVP - Small Dog Meetup | Coby's Cafe
467.description: This is the Members Free RSVP Link - Limited Spots for Members!

464.title: Cinco de Mayo Fiesta for One Human + One Dog | Coby's Cafe
464.description: Join us on May 1 from 6–8pm for a festive evening made for both you and your pup. We'll have a taco bar for humans, dog tacos and pawgaritas for your four-legged family members.

465.title: Cinco de Mayo Fiesta for One Human Only | Coby's Cafe
465.description: Join us on May 1 from 6–8pm for a festive evening made for both you and your pup. We'll have a taco bar for humans, dog tacos and pawgaritas for your four-legged family members.

6UQ32TZ436WW72ECIMTYYUMP.title: Retreiver Meetup - General Ticket | Coby's Cafe
6UQ32TZ436WW72ECIMTYYUMP.description: Join us at Coby's Café on Saturday, May 2 from 5-6:30pm for a Retriever Meetup - tickets required for non-Members!
